pairs.question: What were the dates and location of the Fantastica Mania 2011 events?
pairs.answer: Fantastica Mania 2011 took place on January 22 and January 23, 2011, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

pairs.question: Which two wrestling promotions co-hosted the Fantastica Mania 2011 events?
pairs.answer: The events were co-promoted by Japanese New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) and the Mexican Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre (CMLL).

pairs.question: Who won the CMLL World Welterweight Championship at Fantastica Mania 2011 Night 1, and what was significant about this victory?
pairs.answer: NJPW wrestler Ryusuke Taguchi defeated Máscara Dorada to win the CMLL World Welterweight Championship. This was significant because it marked the first time an NJPW wrestler had won that particular title.

pairs.question: What titles did NJPW representatives defend successfully on Night 1 of Fantastica Mania 2011?
pairs.answer: On Night 1, NJPW representatives successfully defended the CMLL World Middleweight Championship and the IWGP Tag Team Championship against CMLL challengers.

pairs.question: Which wrestlers defended the CMLL World Trios Championship at Fantastica Mania 2011 Night 2?
pairs.answer: La Sombra, Máscara Dorada, and La Mascara defended the CMLL World Trios Championship on the undercard of Night 2.

pairs.question: Who won the IWGP Junior Heavyweight Tag Team Championship at Fantastica Mania 2011 Night 2, and who were their opponents?
pairs.answer: Apollo 55 (Prince Devitt and Ryusuke Taguchi) defeated Golden☆Lovers (Kota Ibushi and Kenny Omega) to win the IWGP Junior Heavyweight Tag Team Championship. They brought the title back to NJPW after it had been held by a DDT team since October 2010.

pairs.question: What happened in the Lucha de Apuestas match between Tiger Mask and Tomohiro Ishii at Fantastica Mania 2011 Night 2?
pairs.answer: Tiger Mask defeated Tomohiro Ishii in a Lucha de Apuestas match, and as a result, Ishii was forced to have his hair shaved off.
